summary: Gets documents attached to Bid Package
description: Returns list of all documents attached to Bid Package, with meta information about all drawings and PDM (Project Document Management) attachments. Supports optional pagination and sorting for PDM attachments via query parameters.

parameters.name: pdm_page
parameters.description: Page number for paginating PDM attachments

parameters.name: pdm_per_page
parameters.description: Number of PDM attachments per page

parameters.name: pdm_sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort PDM attachments by

parameters.name: pdm_search
parameters.description: Search term to filter PDM attachments by document_revision_id

files.description: List of files, attached to the bid package

size.description: Size of the file in bytes

file_path.description: Name of the file (as would be presented in bid package zip)

s3_source.description: URI, where the file is accessible at. Could have limited lifetime

drawing.description: Metadata about drawing (if file is drawing)

pdm.description: Metadata about PDM (Project Document Management) attachment (if file is a PDM document)

pdm_pagination.description: Pagination metadata for PDM attachments (only included when pagination parameters are provided)

has_next_page.description: Whether there is a next page

has_previous_page.description: Whether there is a previous page
